name: ss-doors-manager
description: A desktop management application for SS Doors — track clients, orders, measurements, and generate PDFs.
author: SS Doors

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && node scripts/secure-build.cjs && node scripts/native-binary-manager.cjs linux && electron-builder --config.npmRebuild=false
scripts.build:linux: tsc && vite build && node scripts/secure-build.cjs && node scripts/native-binary-manager.cjs linux && electron-builder --linux AppImage --config.npmRebuild=false
scripts.build:win: tsc && vite build && node scripts/secure-build.cjs && node scripts/native-binary-manager.cjs win32 && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --config.npmRebuild=false && node scripts/native-binary-manager.cjs linux
scripts.build:all: tsc && vite build && node scripts/secure-build.cjs && node scripts/native-binary-manager.cjs linux && electron-builder --linux AppImage --config.npmRebuild=false && node scripts/native-binary-manager.cjs win32 && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --config.npmRebuild=false && node scripts/native-binary-manager.cjs linux
